description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named info. Define a hidden .info job template that runs the script `docker run mbentley/figlet -tf $font $message` followed by `eval $success`, using variables font: big, message: This is only a base information stage, and success: true. Define a hidden .error job that extends .info, overrides message to `/!\ This job must fail /!\` and success to false, causing the script to fail. Define a hidden .warning job that extends .error, sets allow_failure: true, and changes message to This is only a warning !. No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are specified.
